title: Hyphi LED Data
description: Describes the physical layout of addressable LEDs on a Hyphi product. Used by product viewers, Hyphi Hub, and firmware tools.

created.description: ISO 8601 date this file was generated

coordinateSpace.description: Defines the coordinate system. Origin is the product's physical center-bottom.

yUp.description: Y is the up axis (Three.js convention)

id.description: Zero-based strip index, matches firmware channel

count.description: Number of LEDs on this strip

maxCurrent_mA.description: Max current draw at full white, all LEDs

group.description: Logical group name for this strip (e.g. 'petals', 'base')

id.description: Global zero-based LED index across all strips

stripId.description: Which strip this LED belongs to

indexInStrip.description: Zero-based index within the strip (matches firmware pixel index)

position.description: [x, y, z] position in product coordinate space

normal.description: Unit vector indicating which direction the LED faces/emits

defaultColor.description: [R, G, B] or [R, G, B, W] default color

group.description: Logical group this LED belongs to (e.g. 'petal-0', 'ring-a')

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering/selection in hub and viewer
